title: Goodwill Structures
description: A mod that adds random Goodwills into your Minecraft worlds
body:
### This is the perfect spot for a Goodwill!
-------------------------------------------------- 

This mod adds Goodwills around your Minecraft worlds, each of which contain a unique range of donated items for you to discover. Each Goodwill has a different stock in its donation chests, ranging from old clothing to ancient relics.

![Mount. Goodwill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edcd4308eb10617a9ca775457f098ceef56716dc.png)

![Goodwill Interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd898bd3448668914a5abf4c4753df696218fab4.png)
-------------------------------------------------- 
As per request, this mod also adds random hot dog stands, and ice cream stands on the beaches.

![hotdog stands and ice cream stands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a455b52ddd5b1b411620bdfa9f579b33f492bdb5.png)
-------------------------------------------------- 
A datapack version is now available for 1.20.3, 1.20.4, 1.20.5, and 1.20.6
Bring the Goodwill experience to Vanilla
Note: the 1.20.5-1.20.6 install versions have a separate resource pack included with it that should be installed alongside this version in order for it to look right, see the readme inside. The assets are included in the 1.20.3-1.20.4 versions already.

The datapacks should be installed at world generation. Go to datapacks > Open Pack Folder, and copy and paste the folder called "Goodwill Structures" into that folder, not the zip.
-------------------------------------------------- 
Mod inspired from a TikTok video by chriss_wade
